chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Criminal Bail Application No.S- 801 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 13.11.2025. Syed Sardar Hussain Shah, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Muhammad Saleem Chhipa, Advocate for complainant a/w complainant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for State. = Applicant / accused is present on interim pre-arrest bail. For the reasons to be recorded, this bail application is allowed and the ad-interim pre- arrest bail granted subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.600,000/- (Rupees Six Lacs) and P.R Bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court and already submitted by the applicant / accused as on 23.07.2025 is hereby confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Meanwhile, the Statement of Authorities is taken on record alongwith copy of Summary Suit No.140/2025 and another Reported Judgment 2022 YLR 1046 submitted by the counsel for complainant. JUDGE Tufail
